name: Warqnaa V0.3.6 Global Offline 20-Game Edition
features: exact 20-game contract shared by Flutter, Laravel catalog, engine registry and CI
all player-catalog games available in offline bot mode without a server
new independently tested Jackaroo and Leekha engines
manual multi-meld, layoff and drag-to-reorder controls for Hand and Banakil families
color-separated meld groups in the live room
fail-closed game factory and server-authoritative structured-payload validation
transactional action and timeout state transitions with row locks and revisions
backwards-compatible clean-root handling for exact V142/V143 release leftovers
